titleStmt.title: SII 9.498: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 498. (A.R. No. 558 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR IN THE KESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT CHERUVU-BELAGALLU, KURNOOL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka [143]6, Bhāva, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1514 May 8 Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of the Vijayanagara king Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Karaṇam Basavarasa, son of Sōmarasa of Tirapatūr who belonged to the Gautama-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra, made a gift of a plot of land in Keriya-Beḷugallu in the division of Ādavāni-durga, to the actor Nāgayya, whose father Chāgaya had become famous in the drama called Tāyikuṇḍanāṭaka and to the actress Pātri, daughter of the Naṭṭuva Timmayya of Pōtavara. The gift was made in the presence of the god Jalasiṅgadēva for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
1436 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada vayiśākha
śrīmahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇarāya
mahārāyaru prithivīrāje Āḷutti
ralu śrīmatu tirapatūra sōmarasugaḷa
makkaḷu karaṇaṁ bāsavarasaru [keri
ya] beḷugalla jalasiṁgadēvara
pātri sahaya naṭṭuva nāgaiyya
navarige koṭṭa budāna dharmaśāsana
da kramaveṁteṁdare śrīvīrakruṣṇarā
yaru namage māgaṇi Āgi koṭṭa Ādavā
niyadurgake saluva keriyabeḷugalla
grāmadallu kruṣṇabhūmi khaṁ 10 Ā
kruṣṇabhūmi bījavari yēḷu koḷa
ga nela Āyigaḷa Ākṣaradalu
Ayigaḷa bhūmi khaṁ . 0 nela gadde
3 Ākṣaradalu mūgaḷa bījavari yiṁ
tu hadinayidu koḷaga bumi
vaiseka śu 15 pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladallu jala
siṁgadēvara sanidhiyallu sahiraṇya
vudakadānadhārāporvakavāgi Ā
śvalāyanasūtra gavutamagōtratirupatura
sōmarasaiyanavara makaḷu karaṇika basavaya pō
tavarada naṭṭuva tiṁmana magaḷu pātrigū
tāyikuṁḍanāṭakada cāgayana maga naṭṭuva
nāgayanavarige vayiśākha śu 15 puṇyakā
ladalu jalasiṁgadēvara sannidhiyaluśrī
vīrakruṣṇarāyarige puṇyavāgabēku yeṁ
du kruṣṇabhūmiyanu khaṁ . 0 Akṣarada
lu Ayidu koḷagaṁ nela khaṁ . 0 A
kṣaradalu Ayigaḷa kaṁ nela
khaṁ ¥ 3
nellagadde mūgaḷa Aṁtu hadi
nārukoḷaga bhūmiyanu pōtavara
da naṭuva tiṁmayana magaḷu pātrigū
nu tāyikuṁḍanāṭagada cāgayyana
maga naṭuva nāgayyage śrīrukuśā
kheya Āśvalāyanasūtrada gauta
magōtrada tirupattūra sōmara
sara makkaḷu karaṇika basavarasa
yyagaḷu vayisakha śu 15 puṇyakāla
dalu jalasiṁgadēvara saṁnidhiya
llu śrīvīrakṛṣṇa
mahārāyari
ge pu(ṁ)nyavāgabēku yeṁdu be
ḷugalla grāma keṟe baḍaga
kommireḍiya maga gōḷa
vakuḷada kṛṣṇabhūmiya nela
nu tāṁdrapāṭi kāmireḍiya maga
tippa māḍuva gaddeyanu Aṁtu Ā
dinaidu koḷaga bhūminu sa
hira(ṁ)ṇyaudhukadānadhārāpū
rvvakavāgi nimma putra pavu
trapāraṁ
pareyāgi A
nubhavisūdu
Eṁdu koṭa dharma
śāsana maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī
yidake yāru ta
pidare katteya tu
ṇe tiṁdavaru
brāhmaṇana vā
raṇāsīli koṁda
pāpadali hō[haru .]
Digital edition of SII 9.498 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
